Share Everywhere. PostSyncer helps you manage all your social accounts. Schedule content, and create AI videos and
                images in minutes. Prefer an agent in chat? AI agents
                    & MCP , OpenClaw , MCP
                    setup - same accounts, less clicking. Join with Google Get Started For Free Loved by 50,000+ creators See
                Demo 📈 Since I started posting regularly with @PostSyncer: Last week: 10 posts (vs ~1 before) ✍️ 138 likes ❤️, +40 followers 🌟, 2300 impressions 👀 Consistency compounds 💪 What's your posting hack? 🤔 #buildinpublic #IndieDev Adam J Excited to be trying @postsyncer. Been watching it's growth from @tibo_maker for a while. Didn't even wait for the trial period to end before paying for a year subscription. Great stuff, folks! @heyabdulmejid Brian Graf That's exciting!🚀 I was looking for this feature in other social media tools before, but they told me that X didn't support posting to communities yet. 🤔 @postsyncer has this feature! Thanks @heyabdulmejid! Ugur All this for just $7 per month! 🤯🤯🤯 Everytime I try one of @tibo_maker's apps, I end my trial so fast like... "Shutup and take my money 💰" This guy knows how to price and provide value! First with @TweetHunterIO then @outrank_so and now @postsyncer I'm taking inspiration Praveen Wake up: Everyone building social media schedular. But @postsyncer is the best...
